channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Small but mighty: Lenovo IdeaCentre Mini Desktop with Core Ultra 7 and 16GB RAM gets a welcome $110 price cut at Best Buy
item.description: Lenovo IdeaCentre Mini Desktop with Core Ultra 7 and 16GB RAM gets a welcome price cut.

item.title: Avec sa transmission automatique dopée à l’IA, le nouveau vélo électrique Lemmo n’a jamais été aussi technologique
item.description: Nouvelle transmission par dérailleur automatique ajustable via l'IA et programme d’entraînement avec modes personnalisés : le Lemmo One renforce sa position de vélo électrique technologique et connecté, tout en augmentant ses performances moteur.

item.title: L’IA de Tinder veut fouiller la galerie photo de votre smartphone pour créer votre profil
item.description: Tinder teste actuellement en Australie une drôle de fonction IA. L'application propose d'analyser le contenu de la galerie photo de l'utilisateur pour identifier ses centres d'intérêt et améliorer son profil. Des protections sont prévues pour protéger la vie privée, et le traitement est réalisé en local. Il n'empêche que cette nouveauté pose des questions de confidentialité....

item.title: Uber and Rivian Team Up to Deploy 50,000 Robotaxis
item.description: Uber has agreed to invest $1.25 billion in Rivian through 2031.

item.title: Voici la solution radicale de Xiaomi pour éviter le cauchemar des portes bloquées sur sa nouvelle SU7 électrique
item.description: La nouvelle Xiaomi SU7 électrique fait fort avec ses 902 km d'autonomie. Mais c'est aussi l'une des premières voitures électriques à intégrer les nouvelles poignets de portes qui pourront sauver des vies, grâce à une astuce toute simple.

item.title: Rivian will provide 50,000 robotaxis to Uber in a deal worth $1.25 billion
item.description: Rivian and Uber have entered into a major partnership, with the former to provide the latter with 50,000 robotaxis in a deal worth $1.25 billion in funding. This starts with Uber purchasing 10,000 Rivian R2 robotaxis, which will be deployed in San Francisco and Miami by 2028. If all goes well, Uber will scoop up 40,000 more robotaxis by 2030. The company plans to scale the initiative to 25 major cities by 2031. The full $1.25 billion investment is contingent on several autonomous milestones, according to a report by Yahoo Finance. However, Uber has already committed $300 million as an initial ...

item.title: Meta decides not to shut down Horizon Worlds on VR after all
item.description: Horizon Worlds was once a cornerstone of Meta's plans to build a social metaverse -- four years later, the company almost shut it down.

item.title: This ‘Portable’ Party Speaker Gets as Loud as an Actual Chainsaw
item.description: Soundboks is back with another ridiculously loud speaker.

item.title: Darty retire 600 € au Lenovo Yoga Slim 7x, un excellent laptop avec un écran OLED et une puce Snapdragon X Elite sous le capot
item.description: Le Lenovo Yoga Slim 7x se présente avec une solide fiche technique entre sa dalle OLED de 14 pouces et un puissant Snapdragon X Elite pour donner du peps à la machine. Actuellement, le laptop est en promotion chez Darty à 1 199,99 euros au lieu de 1 799,99 euros.

item.title: La bêta de Samsung One UI 8.5 arrive sur les Galaxy S24 (mais pas que)
item.description: Une version test de One UI, l'interface Android de Samsung, s'apprête à être déployée sur des smartphones Galaxy de la gamme FE. Ce n'est jamais arrivé auparavant.

item.title: When confidence becomes a risk: The gap between cyber resilience readiness and reality
item.description: Most organizations believe they're cyber-ready, but data on their recovery capabilities tells a different story.

item.title: Harlowe has a cheaper solution for lighting 360-degree shoots
item.description: Companies like Bushman already sell omnidirectional camera lights for 360-degree shoots, but they start at over $300, which is more than half the price of popular 360-degree cameras from companies like DJI and Insta360. Harlowe, a company known for lighting accessories that cater to influencers and amateurs, has released a $95 alternative called the Omni […]...

item.title: Paid streaming for cheapskates is having a moment
item.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. Streaming is getting expensive: This week, Amazon Prime Video became the latest streaming service to increase prices. In addition to the annual $139 fee for Prime, consumers now have to […]...

item.title: Google unveils new ‘vibe design’ tool to help anyone design a high-fidelity UI using natural language
item.description: You've heard of vibe coding, but Google wants you to think of the entire software design process as a 'vibe' with new AI tools.

item.title: Android 16 : un bug sournois débranche votre VPN (et Google l’ignore depuis des mois)
item.description: Vous pensiez naviguer incognito, à l'abri des regards indiscrets ? Détrompez-vous. Un dysfonctionnement particulièrement furtif frappe actuellement Android 16, coupant l'accès à Internet de votre VPN sans jamais vous en avertir. Une faille exaspérante qui fait s'arracher les cheveux aux fournisseurs de sécurité, d'autant que Google semble jouer la montre. ...

item.title: SpaceX Fires Up Its Biggest, Baddest Rocket Yet: Starship V3
item.description: It now appears Starship Version 3 is on track for an inaugural launch in April.

item.title: A new iPhone hacking tool puts some iOS 18 users at risk
item.description: Google and cybersecurity companies Lookout and iVerify have detailed a new hacking technique that potentially puts a significant portion of iPhone users in danger, just by visiting the wrong web page. The hack is called "DarkSword" and it currently targets iOS 18 releases between iOS 18.4 and iOS 18.6.2. For its part, an Apple spokesperson told Engadget that the company had patched the underlying vulnerabilities in iOS versions 15 through 26 last year; the company also issued an emergency update for devices running iOS 15 and 16 that are unable to run newer versions of iOS. The company does no...

item.title: Norouz : la fête du printemps en Iran qui a défié empires, conquêtes et siècles
item.description: Héritée de la Perse antique et du zoroastrisme, Norouz a survécu à toutes les turbulences politiques et religieuses qui ont agité l'Iran depuis presque trois millénaires.

item.title: Lina Khan was right
item.description: In 2021, the virtual world was the future of the internet. The pandemic had sequestered everyone indoors, heightening the appeal of digital communities. Facebook rebranded to Meta - a sign of the tech giant's investment in and commitment to the metaverse as the future of the internet. Despite losing billions in VR, Meta released an […]

item.title: Vampire Survivors spinoff Vampire Crawlers is coming to PC and consoles on April 21
item.description: Poncle could be about to ruin the planet’s productivity all over again now that Vampire Crawlers has a release date for PC and consoles. The dungeon-crawling roguelike deckbuilder — which is a Vampire Survivors spinoff — is coming to Steam, Xbox Series X/S, PS5 and Nintendo Switch on April 21. It’ll cost $10. Alternatively, you’ll be able to check it out via Xbox Game Pass on day one. Vampire Crawlers is on the way to iOS and Android as well. However, you’ll have to wait until sometime later this year to play it on mobile devices.Vampire Crawlers is set in the same world as Vampire Survivors a...

item.title: FBI seizes pro-Iranian hacking group’s websites after destructive Stryker hack
item.description: The FBI and the Justice Department took down two websites linked to the pro-Iranian hacktivist group Handala, which last week hacked medical tech giant Stryker.

item.title: Closing AI learning gaps between leaders and employees
item.description: How organizations can reduce AI learning gaps between leaders and employees to.

item.title: CISA urges companies to secure Microsoft Intune systems after hackers mass-wipe Stryker devices
item.description: The U.S. cybersecurity agency urged companies to prevent access to systems used for remotely managing their fleets of employee devices after hackers broke into a major U.S. medical tech giant and remotely wiped thousands of phones and computers.

item.title: Belkin’s wireless HDMI adapter freed me from a long annoying cable when I travel
item.description: I’ve never been comfortable logging into streaming services on a hotel or Airbnb TV. My alternative for watching our favorite shows on a big screen is traveling with a 10-foot HDMI cable and a USB-C-to-HDMI adapter for directly connecting our mobile devices to an unfamiliar TV. Belkin’s wireless HDMI adapter will let me leave that […]

item.title: Vous stockez vos mots de passe dans vos notes ? Ce virus le sait et s’en sert pour vous dépouiller
item.description: Un nouveau virus baptisé Perseus s’attaque aux smartphones Android en se cachant dans des apps IPTV populaires. Après s'être glissé sur le téléphone, il va se mettre à fouiller dans les applications de notes. En ciblant Google Keep, Samsung Notes, Evernote ou encore Simple Notes, ce malware cherche à mettre la main sur vos secrets.

item.title: How ‘Project Hail Mary’ Made Andy Weir’s Story Even More Cinematic
item.description: io9 spoke to directors Phil Lord and Chris Miller about some additions to the movie, out March 20.

item.title: Waymo hits 170 million miles while avoiding serious mayhem
item.description: Waymo says its autonomous vehicles have now traveled over 170 million miles while continuing to avoid serious crashes and injuries at a rate much better than human drivers. The company updated its online safety hub to reflect the new driving figures. But despite these successes, some safety advocates are raising questions about how the company […]

item.title: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 nominations are still open
item.description: Nominate your startup, or one you know, for TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 before May 27. Chance to win $100,000 equity-free funding and VC access.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, March 20 (game #1013)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, March 20 (game #1516)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, March 20 (game #747)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: This new DarkSword iOS exploit can steal almost everything from your iPhone – here's what we know
item.description: At least six flaws are being chained to target iPhone users, so make sure you patch up.

item.title: I put the Bluesound Pulse Flex and Sonos Era 100 wireless speakers against each other — and it was hard to choose between ‘in-your-face bass’ or ‘richer mid-range textures’
item.description: I compared Bluesound’s and Sonos’s wireless speakers and I never expected it to be this hard to pick an undisputed sonic champ.

item.title: Microsoft hands Copilot haters and 'Microslop' pushers yet more ammunition with 'how to' videos that showcase an embarrassing use of AI
item.description: AI hallucinations can often be a problem, and they certainly are with the images Copilot has created on the Windows Learning Center.

item.title: Netflix and Arrow Films announce Stranger Things: The Complete Series, a 4K Blu-Ray boxset that 'fans will be delighted to own' — if they can stomach the price
item.description: Stranger Things is getting multiple Blu-Ray physical editions to celebrate its 10th anniversary, but they won't come cheap.

item.title: Is this the game-changer? TCL's new micro-LED TV massively cuts the price of the 'OLED-killer' tech — and it launched a new 300Hz 'Super Quantum Dot' TV too
item.description: TCL's new 163-inch micro-LEDs are selling in China for less than half the price you'd expect

item.title: La crise de la RAM va-t-elle retarder la sortie de la PS6 et de la Xbox Next ? Le patron de Take-Two (GTA 6) répond
item.description: Alors que la pénurie de mémoire RAM impacte tous les appareils électroniques, certains s'inquiètent du devenir des prochaines consoles de Sony et Microsoft. À raison ou à tort ?

item.title: The gender gap no one talks about: men missing from care professions
item.description: Here’s how to fix it. For decades, in the name of workplace equality we’ve encouraged women to enter male-dominated professions because those jobs are better paid, more prestigious, and more powerful. Women engineers. Women in tech. Women in leadership. That agenda still matters but it is not enough.

item.title: Samsung TQ55S95F : le prix de l’un des meilleurs TV OLED pour les films et le gaming est en chute libre
item.description: Pic de luminosité record, traitement antireflet bluffant, meilleures technologies gaming présentes... Le TV OLED Samsung TQ55S95F n'a pas du tout volé son excellente note de 9/10. Actuellement, Ubaldi le propose à 1 444 euros au lieu de 2 390 euros.

item.title: 900 km d’autonomie : voici les secrets de Xiaomi pour faire mieux que la Tesla Model 3 avec sa nouvelle SU7 électrique
item.description: La nouvelle Xiaomi SU7 électrique restylée frappe fort, avec de nouvelles batteries, un nouveau moteur. De quoi annoncer plus de 900 km d'autonomie. On décortique ce qu'il y a sous le capot.

item.title: Crimson Desert developer's shares tank despite the game's strong Metacritic score
item.description: Pearl Abyss reportedly saw a huge drop in its share price following the release of Crimson Desert reviews.

item.title: Rivian sacrifices 2027 profit goal to push deeper into autonomy
item.description: Rivian admitted in a regulatory filing that it is delaying its goal of reaching "positive EBITDA" next year because of how much it is spending on developing self-driving technology.

item.title: How to watch 2026 March Madness online for free
item.description: How to watch March Madness for free. Live stream 2026 March Madness for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: PlayStation Network : Sony va abandonner le nom PSN mais pas ses fonctions
item.description: Sony va supprimer une marque bien connue des joueurs : le PSN, alias PlayStation Network, tirera sa révérence en septembre. Qu'on se rassure, il n'y aura aucun changement dans les fonctions du service.

item.title: Le mystérieux modèle IA de Xiaomi égale les géants américains pour un prix dérisoire
item.description: L'apparition d'une puissante intergilligence artificielle inconnue au bataillon a semé la zizanie du côté de la Silicon Valley. Le mystère vient de prendre fin en révélant une offensive spectaculaire de Xiaomi, dont le nouveau modèle rivalise avec les leaders américains pour une fraction du prix.

item.title: HP’s Intel Core Ultra 7 265 mini PC workstation for developers and professionals is 50% off right now - a half price Best Buy Tech Fest steal
item.description: HP’s Z2 Mini G1i workstation delivers solid performance for creative tasks, everyday productivity, and multitasking, and it’s half price right now.

item.title: What Will ‘The Scream’ Look Like in 300 Years? This Tool Simulates Its Future
item.description: The tool remains an interesting proof of concept, but it could expand into something genuinely useful for researchers and conservators.

item.title: Get this MacBook Air for under $200 — a lightweight, reliable Mac
item.description: Grab a refurbished Apple MacBook Air (2017) for $199.97 (reg. $999) — a lightweight, reliable Mac perfect as a travel laptop or backup computer.

item.title: The Strait of Hormuz has been weaponized before. A look at past disruptions to the critical oil waterway
item.description: Before the current war in Iran, nearly a fifth of the world’s oil traveled through the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. and Israel’s war with Iran has thrust the Strait of Hormuz once again into the crosshairs of a geopolitical conflict.Iran has ground to a halt nearly all traffic in the waterway that connects the Persian Gulf to the rest of the globe’s oceans, shutting down a critical path for the world’s flow of oil. Attacks on commercial ships and threats of further strikes have stopped nearly all tankers from carrying oil, gas and other goods through the passage. That’s also led to cuts from som...

item.title: Tesla’s Full Self-Driving is on the cusp of a recall
item.description: Tesla's Full Self-Driving system is facing an expanded investigation by the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration over its safety during poor road visibility conditions, as previously reported by Reuters. Tesla vehicles with Full Self-Driving (FSD) have a "degradation detection" system that's supposed to alert drivers to take over when the vehicle's cameras can't see the […]...

item.title: Casio’s new $600 calculator is a work of art
item.description: Can a basic calculator with an old-school segmented LCD screen be beautiful? Casio's response to that question is its new S100X featuring a traditional Japanese hand-painted finish using sap from the lacquer tree, giving the calculator a glossy black finish with warm red highlights around the edges. It somehow looks even more luxurious than if […]

item.title: Alexa+ launches in the UK
item.description: Amazon’s next-generation smart assistant has entered its Early Access program in the UK, marking Alexa+’s European debut following rollouts in the US, Canada and Mexico. Starting March 19, invitations to start using the smarter, more conversational Alexa will be sent out to "hundreds of thousands" of willing participants, Amazon said in a press release, adding that Alexa is the most popular voice assistant in the UK. As well as its more natural communication, agentic capabilities, contextual awareness and ability to remember previous conversations across devices, Amazon that users across the p...

item.title: Signal’s Creator Is Helping Encrypt Meta AI
item.description: Moxie Marlinspike says the technology powering his encrypted AI chatbot, Confer, will be integrated into Meta AI. The move could help protect the AI conversations of millions of people.

item.title: Great News: ‘Sonic 4’ Has Chaos Emeralds and Matt Berry
item.description: Start your rampant speculation now as to who Berry could be uniquely enunciating as in the next 'Sonic' movie.

item.title: Paramount’s $110 billion Warner Bros. gamble
item.description: Today on Decoder, let’s talk about the big Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery merger. This deal could reshape all of media and entertainment if and when it closes. That’s still an if, which we’ll come back to — right now Paramount head David Ellison is very much acting like he’s over the finish line after outbidding Netflix, […]

item.title: K2 to launch its first high-powered satellite for space compute
item.description: K2's Gravitas is an ambitious project that aims to demonstrate the tech needed to build data centers in space.

item.title: Tools for founders to navigate and move past conflict
item.description: Founders can create frameworks for working through conflict and change when the team is just two or three people, and if done correctly, it can scale with the company.

item.title: Alphabet’s X has a new spinout, and it’s going after one of the world’s most expensive bureaucratic nightmares
item.description: Anori aims to shrink down the pre-development process by getting all parties, including the city, on to a unified platform from the start so that compliance conflicts are surfaced in weeks instead of months or years.

item.title: ‘This is what Val wanted’ — Val Kilmer’s AI movie return has his family’s blessing, but it feels deeply unsettling
item.description: First Line Films has shared its first look at the AI-generated Val Kilmer character for the movie As Deep As The Grave.

item.title: Maryam Banikarim on career chaos, C-suite pressure, and betting on yourself
item.description: The former CMO of Univision reflects on navigating setbacks, redefining identity beyond job titles, and how her upbringing during Iran’s revolution shapes her view of resilience and leadership. Career disruption is accelerating across the economy—and few people have navigated it more boldly than Maryam Banikarim. The former CMO of Univision, Gannett, and Hyatt, and host of The Messy Parts podcast, Banikarim shares hard-won wisdom about C-suite politics, and what it means to ultimately bet on yourself. Growing up in Iran during the time of revolution, Banikarim offers a unique perspective on th...

item.title: Google Maps veut faciliter le partage de position avec un nouveau bouton
item.description: Le partage de sa position via Maps pourrait devenir plus clair. Actuellement, il est un peu trop caché pour qu'on pense à l'utiliser.
